race.description: Project 365 O&M Mental Health Round Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: FOREVER WITH NED (13) stripped fitter last start and ran a better race when third at Stawell over 1100m. Heading the right way and has claims. BEAU STRADA (14) is stepping out at this course for the first time. Last appeared when she finished third over 1000m at Mornington on May 25. Consistent and gets every chance. FRIENDZONED (15) returns from a spell. Ran fifth in a jump-out at Caulfield. Opened last campaign with a win at Donald over 1000m. Respect any market confidence. TRIPLE TRIPLE (6) resumed from a spell with a decent win last time out over 1107m at Kilmore. Back in good order and can give this a shake.
